name: Pacific Energy & Mining Company
summary: Pacific Energy & Mining Company operates as an oil and gas company. The company explores and produces oil and gas properties in the United States. It has non-operated working interests in oil and gas fields in the state of Utah. The company is based in Reno, Nevada. On November 7, 2019, the voluntary petition of Pacific Energy & Mining Company for reorganization was converted to Chapter 7 liquidation in the US Bankruptcy Court for the District of Utah. It had filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy on July 10, 2019.
